=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (10:3-10:14) TS377044: This Schema subclass defines its own constructor. For Schema classes, constructor overrides break decoding behavior for the class shape. Custom construction can be expressed through a static `new` method instead. effect(overriddenSchemaConstructor)
  Fix 0: "Disable overriddenSchemaConstructor for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable overriddenSchemaConstructor for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Rewrite using the static 'new' pattern"
  Fix 3: "Remove the constructor override"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable overriddenSchemaConstructor for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable overriddenSchemaConstructor for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Rewrite using the static 'new' pattern" ===

--- file:///.src/overriddenSchemaConstructor_static.ts ---
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export class InvalidBecauseOfConstructor
  extends Schema.Class<InvalidBecauseOfConstructor>("InvalidBecauseOfConstructor")({
    a: Schema.Finite
  })
{
  b: number
  // should be report here at constructor location
  public static new() {
    const _this = new this({ a: 42 });
    _this.b = 56;
    return _this;
}
}


=== [D1] Fix 3: "Remove the constructor override" ===

--- file:///.src/overriddenSchemaConstructor_static.ts ---
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export class InvalidBecauseOfConstructor
  extends Schema.Class<InvalidBecauseOfConstructor>("InvalidBecauseOfConstructor")({
    a: Schema.Finite
  })
{
  b: number
}
